fields.newPasswordPlaceholder: Enter a new password (at least 8 characters)

login.title: Sign in to Flocks
login.description: Sign in to this Flocks instance with your local account
login.recoverUsername: Forgot your username? Sign in to the machine running Flocks and run
login.recoverPassword: Recover password: after confirming the username, run

setup.title: Initialize administrator account
setup.description: This is the first time the account system is enabled on this instance. Create an administrator — all existing sessions will be assigned to this administrator.
setup.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match

forceChange.title: Please change your password first
forceChange.descriptionSuffix: is currently using a one-time / reset password. You must set a new password before continuing.
forceChange.passwordMismatch: The two new passwords do not match

admin.sectionDescription: Manage the current administrator account and password.
admin.resetConfirmDescription: Reset the password for the current account? The active session will be cleared and a one-time password will be generated for re-signing in.
admin.resetDialogDescription: The account has been reset. Copy the one-time password first — you will be redirected to the sign-in page after closing this dialog.
admin.resetDialogWarning: Copy and save the password now — it will not be shown again after this dialog is closed.

pro.sectionDescription: Manage local users, roles, and passwords for this node.
pro.loadFailed: Failed to load enterprise account management
pro.createDialogFormDescription: Enter a username and role. A one-time password will be generated automatically.
pro.createDialogDescription: Account created. Copy the one-time password and share it with the user to sign in and change password immediately.
pro.createDialogWarning: This password is shown once only. Copy it now.
pro.resetOtherConfirmDescription: Reset password for {{username}}? A one-time password will be generated.
pro.resetOtherDialogDescription: Share this one-time password with the target user. They must change it after sign-in.
pro.resetOtherDialogWarning: This password is shown once only. Copy it now.
pro.deleteConfirmDescription: Delete account {{username}}? This action cannot be undone.

error.defaultMeError: Could not fetch sign-in status, please try again later
error.defaultBackendError: Could not reach the backend, please try again later
error.noPermissionToDeleteSession: You do not have permission to delete this session
